units.name: Aegis
units.prompt: Push forward aggressively. Shield_wall facing the enemy cluster. If flanked, turn to face the biggest threat. Attack when possible.

units.name: Deadeye
units.prompt: Position for clear sight lines. Prioritize killing wounded enemies with precision_shot. If forced to move, retreat away from threats. Suppressing_fire to slow rushers.

units.name: Prophet
units.prompt: Scan priority targets each turn to reveal their strategy. Use recalibrate on your damage dealer to boost effectiveness. Stay behind allies and maintain range. Never get adjacent to enemy vectors.

units.name: Marksman
units.prompt: Maintain distance. Use precision_shot on high-value targets — medics first, then damage dealers. Use suppressing_fire if enemies close in.

units.name: Seer
units.prompt: Scan priority targets each turn to reveal their strategy. Use recalibrate on your damage dealer to boost effectiveness. Stay behind allies and maintain range. Never get adjacent to enemy vectors.

units.name: Bulwark
units.prompt: Advance toward the nearest enemy. Use shield_wall facing the direction with the most enemies. If an enemy is adjacent, attack them.

actions.thinking: Deadeye and Prophet are both at dist=4, right at scan range limit. I need to move closer to scan effectively. Moving to (3,3) brings me to dist=3 from both Deadeye(3,0) and Prophet(2,1), safely within scan range. Then scan Deadeye (striker) to reveal their strategy and deal 1dmg — strikers are high priority threats.

Seer is the highest-priority scan target at dist=3, well within range. Scan reveals their strategy and deals 1 damage. No need to move first — scan from current position, then recalibrate Deadeye (striker, our damage dealer) but they're at (3,0) which is not adjacent. I can move toward Deadeye after scanning to set up recalibrate next turn, or just wait. Actually Deadeye is at dist=3 from me, not adjacent, so recalibrate isn't possible this turn. Best play: scan Seer now, then move closer to Deadeye for next turn recalibrate.

All enemies are out of range (closest is Prophet at dist=5, my range is 2). I need to advance toward the enemy. Moving to (4,3) gets me closer while staying safe. Still no enemies in range after moving, so I'll wait for second action.
Seer is in range at dist=3 from current position. I haven't moved, so precision_shot deals full 2dmg. No adjacent enemies blocking it. Fire on Seer, then hold position.

Round 1, all enemies are far. Push forward aggressively toward the enemy cluster centered around (3,3)-(4,3). Move to (1,2) to advance. No adjacents to shield_wall yet, so use shield_wall facing North toward incoming enemies as a defensive posture.
No enemies adjacent. Nearest enemy is Aegis at (1,2), dist=4. Advance toward it. Move to (2,3) to close distance by 2. Enemies are mostly south, use shield_wall facing S.

Seer is already scanned. Marksman is the priority threat — scan it to reveal its strategy and deal 1dmg. I'm at (3,1), Marksman at (4,3) dist=3, in range. No need to move first. After scanning, stay put.

Prophet (oracle) at (3,1) is unscanned and in range at dist=2. Scanning Prophet is highest priority — reveals their strategy and deals 1 damage. I'm already at (3,3) which is valid. After scanning, I can wait or hold position. Deadeye is already known. Aegis is a sentinel, lower scan priority. Stay at current position to keep all targets in scan range.

Prophet (oracle) is in range at dist 3 from current position. I haven't moved this turn, so precision_shot deals 2dmg. Orders say medics first, then damage dealers — oracle is high value. I'll fire precision_shot on Prophet, then move to maintain distance from advancing enemies.

Seer is in range at dist 3 (within my range 2? No, range is ≤2 tiles). Seer is at dist 3, out of precision_shot range. No enemies in range 2. Move toward Seer to get in range, then shoot. Moving to (3,2) puts me at dist 1 from Seer at (3,3) — in range. Not adjacent to Vector so precision_shot is valid.

Nearest enemies are Aegis at (1,2) and Deadeye at (3,2), both dist 2. Orders say advance toward nearest enemy and use shield_wall facing direction with most enemies. Moving to (2,2) puts me adjacent to both Aegis and Deadeye. From (2,2), enemies are S relative: Aegis is at (1,2) which is W, Deadeye is at (3,2) which is E. Actually from (2,2): Aegis(1,2) is W, Deadeye(3,2) is E, Prophet(3,1) is SE. Most enemies are to the south/lateral. I'll move to (2,2) to get adjacent to Deadeye and near Aegis, then use shield_wall facing S to cover the southern approach where enemies cluster.

Bulwark is adjacent at (2,2). I'm fortified with 50% damage reduction. Orders say attack when possible and shield_wall facing enemy cluster. I'll attack Bulwark first, then shield_wall facing East to protect allies Deadeye and Prophet from Bulwark and the enemies beyond.

I'm at (3,3) with 4/6 HP. Deadeye is adjacent at (3,2) — this BLOCKS my scan ability. I need to move away from Deadeye first, then scan Aegis (unknown prompt, in range at dist=3). Moving to (4,3) gets me away from Deadeye and keeps Aegis in scan range. From (4,3), Aegis is at dist=3+1=4 tiles — still in range. Then scan Aegis to reveal their strategy.

Marksman tried to precision_shot me last turn but was out of range — they're a priority threat. Seer already scanned me, knows my strategy. Bulwark is adjacent to Deadeye with shield_wall facing S (protecting Deadeye). I should recalibrate Deadeye to boost their effectiveness, then reposition. Deadeye is at (3,2), I'm at (3,1) — that's adjacent, so recalibrate is valid. After recalibrating, I should move to maintain range and avoid being adjacent to Bulwark.

firstAction.addendum: Priority: Bulwark at (2,2) is shielding with shield_wall facing S — flank from east or north to bypass shield. Marksman at (4,4) used precision_shot last turn, target them next if in range.

Prophet is an oracle (high-value target per orders). Both Prophet and Deadeye are at range 2 from current position. I haven't moved yet so precision_shot does full 2dmg. Target Prophet first. No need to move — maintaining distance is the order.

Bulwark is adjacent at (2,2). I'm fortified with 50% damage reduction. Orders say attack when possible and shield_wall facing enemy cluster. Enemies are mostly to the East (Seer at 4,3, Marksman at 4,4). Attack Bulwark first, then shield_wall East to protect allies Prophet and Deadeye from the ranged threats.
Aegis is adjacent at (1,2). Attack them. Then use shield_wall facing East toward Deadeye and Prophet cluster.

Critical situation: I'm at 3/6 HP. Seer is adjacent at (4,3) which blocks my scan ability. Marksman targeted me last turn with precision_shot (foresight), and Bulwark attacked (1,2). Then I can scan Bulwark at dist=2 to deal damage and reveal their strategy. Deadeye is healthy and attacking Bulwark - recalibrate could help but I need intel more. Priority: escape adjacency, then scan.

Foresight shows Deadeye will precision_shot Bulwark (wounded) next turn - I should recalibrate Marksman to boost damage output, but Deadeye is adjacent (dist:1) which is a Vector concern... wait, I'm Oracle not Vector. After shooting Bulwark, I can move to (4,3) to reposition away from Seer and keep pressure on Marksman.

Deadeye is adjacent at (4,3) — precision_shot is blocked when adjacent to enemy. Need to move away first to enable precision_shot. Priority target is Prophet (wounded) at (5,2), but dist=3 so out of range. Best: move to (3,5), precision_shot Deadeye since Prophet out of range from all positions. Actually check (5,4): Deadeye at (4,3), dist=sqrt(1+1)=1.41 — that's >1, so NOT adjacent. Precision_shot available! And Prophet at (5,2) dist=2 — in range! Move to (5,4), precision_shot Prophet!
Aegis is adjacent at (1,2). I'm fortified with 50% damage reduction. Orders say attack adjacent enemies. Attack Aegis, then use shield_wall facing East where Deadeye and Prophet are clustered.

Bulwark is adjacent at (2,2) and wounded — attack to finish or weaken. I'm fortified so I keep 50% DR if I don't move. Orders say attack when possible. I'll attack Bulwark first, then shield_wall facing E to protect Prophet at (5,2) from the eastern enemy cluster.

Bulwark is adjacent at (2,2) and wounded. I'm fortified with 50% damage reduction. Orders say attack when possible and shield_wall facing enemy cluster. I'll attack Bulwark first, then shield_wall facing E toward the enemy cluster (Seer at 4,4 and Marksman at 5,3). Staying put preserves Fortify.
